title: GILGAL AH THA IH LA DING

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Canaan gam zuan ding in
A pai diamdiam lai un
Ai khua sim idng hong ki thawi uh
Joshua lung kham lua in
Topa tung thungen aa
Na khut sung teipi zan in Topa' in ci hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Gilgal ah tha ih la ding a nung kik lo
Misiang te mainawt ni
Kha tha tawh ih do ding a
Khazih gam zai sem sem ding
Khazih a ding ih tha saan ciat ni

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kha zih galkap te aw
Hong ding khia meng meng un
Topa'n thu hong ciam khin zo a
Lau ken la lung kia ken
Galhiam awh ki thawi un nasik na ciang ciang
Na gam hong pia ning ci

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tu'n Joshua tekta a
A kum zong tam lua ta
Galsim ding tam lua Joshua aw
Na gal sim ding tamlua namite tha pia in
Canaan gam na hawm sak in Topa'n ci hi
